Secretary) Recruitment Rules, 1995, IlllJIely: 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal (Principal Prh'ate Secretary) Re c ruitment (Amendment) Rules, 1998. 1 -- 14 of 16 -- ( ['l1'1 I1-~ 3(il] 'lro! ~ <r.mr : amTtIT\UI (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Schedule to the Central AdmInistrative Tribunal (Principal Private Secretary) Recruitment Rules, 1996, - (a) in the entry under coll.ttm 2, for the brackets and figures " (996) " , the brackets and figures " (J 998) ' shall be substituted; (b) for the entry under col umn "Rs.I0000-325-15200 " shall be substituted; 4, the (c) for the entry under column 5, the "Selection by seniority " shall be substItuted; entry entry (d) for the entry under column 11, the entry "By protrotion fai I ing which by deputation ", shall be substi tuted; (e) for the entr>' under column 12, the following entry shall be subst! tuted, name ly: - "Protrotion: From atrongst Privat.e Secretaries in the Central Adminsitrative Tribunal with 8 years regular service in the pay scale of Rs.6500-200-10500 on selection by seniorit.y basis. Note: Where juniors who have completed their qualifying or eligibi I ity service are being considered for protrotion, their senlOrs shall also be considered pro\'ided they are not short of the requiSite qual Hying or eltgibilit>' sE'r\'ice b~' trore than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, Whl c hpver is If's8. Deputation: From atro(~sl Officers of the Central Government/ State Governments/High Courts with at least two years regular service in the grade of Principal Private Secretary in the scale of pay of Rs. 10000-325-15200 or in the grade of Private Secretary with at least eight years regular service in the scale of pay of Rs.6500-200-10500.
